profiles.name: Gaming Setup
profiles.description: Core game setup with Steam, a browser, archive support, and media playback.

selections.reason: Steam is the default launcher for the first gaming setup path.
A reliable browser helps account setup, downloads, and support flows.
Archive support is useful for mods, tools, and downloaded packages.
Useful for media playback, but not essential to the base gaming setup.
Repair utility belongs in the repair profile by default.

profiles.name: Living-Room Media PC
profiles.description: Focused setup for couch-friendly media playback and basic browsing.

selections.reason: VLC is the strongest default for local playback in the first media profile.
A browser is useful for streaming sites and device setup.
Archive support helps with media tools and downloaded files.
Useful on some living-room PCs, but not assumed by default.
Repair utility is available but not part of the default media path.

profiles.name: Repair Toolkit — Safe
profiles.description: Low-risk tools for inspection, troubleshooting, and basic support.

selections.reason: Autoruns is a strong inspection utility for startup and persistence checks.
Archive support is commonly needed during repair work.
A browser helps research, downloads, and vendor support pages.
Media playback is not part of the safe repair default.
Game launcher is not part of the safe repair default.
